overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the vibrant Toussaint countryside on a sunny day. The character passes through a stone archway entrance, traverses a village camp with tents, walks past an orange tower through vineyards, and approaches a green timber-framed house.

events.description: Geralt passes through the stone archway from outside into the village proper

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily toward and through the stone archway entrance into the village

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at the archway holding a polearm
armored guard standing at the archway holding a polearm

entered.detail: large weathered stone arch with tiled roof serving as village gate
cluster of rustic houses with tiled roofs visible through the arch
worn dirt trail leading through the archway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with Geralt approaching a large stone archway on a sunny day. Two armored guards stand at the entrance holding polearms as Geralt walks through the arch into the village beyond.

events.description: passing by a makeshift campsite with tents and wooden debris on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path through the village outskirts, passing a makeshift camp with villagers working

notable_agents.action: villager working near wooden logs and debris at the campsite

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence lining the path
tan canvas tents and temporary shelters with wooden debris
wooden wagon with red wheels parked near a house
tall narrow orange plaster tower with wooden balconies

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through the village outskirts, passing a wooden fence and a makeshift campsite with tents on the right. A wooden cart sits on the left, and an orange tower becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: moving from the village camp area into the vineyard rows
path curves slightly left as it rounds the orange tower

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a narrow path between vineyard rows, passing the orange tower on the right

entered.detail: rows of grapevines on trellises lining both sides of the path
crumbling stone wall remnants alongside the vineyard
blue mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the vineyards

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vineyard path with rows of grapevines on both sides. Geralt walks past the orange tower on the right, with crumbling stone walls on the left and distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: approaching the green timber-framed house with large tree providing shade

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the vineyard path approaching and passing a green timber-framed house

entered.detail: two-story house with green plaster walls and blue timber framing
mature oak tree with spreading branches providing shade over the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the vineyards approaching a distinctive green house with blue timber framing. A large tree provides shade over the path as the house grows larger on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a guarded stone entrance through a rustic village and into the lush vineyards of the Toussaint countryside. It begins with Geralt passing between two armored guards at a large stone archway, moving forward into the village outskirts. As he follows a dirt path, the scene opens up to reveal a makeshift campsite with tents and a wooden cart before an orange tower emerges in the distance. The camera then shifts toward a vineyard path lined with rows of grapevines and crumbling stone walls, passing the orange tower as distant mountains come into view. Finally, the path leads under the shade of a large tree and toward a distinctive green house with blue timber framing that grows larger on the left.
